title: Potion Cocktails
description: Adds a new potion type to the game!
body:
# Potion Cocktails
## Brand New Potion Type!
- New potion type that can crafted using normal potions and amethyst shards
- Gives the effect for half the time
- Consumed in half the time
- Can stack to 16
- Perfect for hosting dinner parties!


### Textures
- Special thanks to [McAceJr](https://modrinth.com/user/McAceJr) for making the textures
